# Company & product

Acme Fixtures Co. ships internal tools for a twelve-person design team. Their existing review
process is a shared folder of screenshots and a Slack thread; nothing ties a decision to the
artifact that motivated it.

## What they make

A pipeline of design deliverables — briefs, research notes, scope docs — that currently live as
disconnected files. The pain is not authoring; it is *seeing the whole thing at once*.

## Constraints

- Single-user, local, dev-oriented. No auth, no hosting.
- The vault is read-only from any dashboard's point of view.
